scenes.title: The Bus Stop
scenes.background_prompt: A city bus stop with a glass shelter, a bench, a posted schedule, puddles on the sidewalk, and a lamppost. Cloudy morning. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A city bus stop on a cloudy morning. A woman in a navy trench coat sits on the metal bench under a glass shelter, reading a folded newspaper with her legs crossed. Next to her, a teenager in a black hoodie and ripped jeans leans against the shelter wall, wearing large over-ear headphones and scrolling on a phone, completely absorbed. A stray orange cat with a slightly torn ear sits on the sidewalk near the base of a lamppost, grooming its paw. Puddles from recent rain dot the pavement, reflecting the gray sky. A bus schedule is posted behind the glass panel, and a crumpled coffee cup sits near the trash bin.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place woman on the metal bench under the glass shelter (left), sitting with legs crossed, reading a folded newspaper. Place teenager leaning against the shelter wall beside her, wearing headphones, scrolling on a phone. Place cat on the sidewalk near the lamppost base (right), sitting and grooming its paw.
scenes.scene_description: In the foreground on the left, there are green bushes with small yellow and white flowers growing from the ground next to a grey sidewalk that contains several blue puddles. A brown rectangular display board on a post stands to the left of a bus stop shelter. The shelter features a brown frame, a curved roof, and transparent glass panels. Inside the shelter, a woman with brown hair in a bun and a yellow headband sits on a wooden bench; she wears a green sweater, brown pants, and blue shoes while reading a newspaper. To the right of the shelter, a teenager with brown hair leans against a support post, wearing blue headphones, a green hoodie, blue jeans, and brown shoes while looking at a smartphone. Next to the teenager is a tall brown lamp post with a glowing light. On the sidewalk to the right of the lamp post, an orange tabby cat sits near a puddle and licks its paw. The far right foreground contains more green foliage and yellow flowers. Behind the bus stop, a row of large, leafy green trees with brown trunks fills the midground. To the right of the trees, a grassy area with clovers and flowers sits beside a grey road that curves into the distance. In the far background, several tan and pink city buildings stand under a bright blue sky filled with large, white, fluffy clouds, indicating a clear day following a rain shower.

CH: a woman with brown hair in a bun
an orange tabby cat licking its paw
S: a bus stop shelter after a rain shower
a grey sidewalk with several blue puddles
a sunny day with large white clouds
tall city buildings in the far background
IE: the rain has recently stopped falling
the bus is expected to arrive soon
the cat found a spot near a puddle
IR: the woman feels relaxed while reading
the teenager seems focused on his phone
the cat appears calm and content
P: waiting for the bus to arrive
reading the news to pass the time
listening to music while checking messages
A: sitting on a wooden bench reading
leaning against a brown support post
looking down at a small smartphone
grooming a paw next to a puddle
CO: the ground remains wet from the storm
the characters are waiting at the stop
the lamp post glows in the daylight

SC: as they wait for the bus
